raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Highway Patrol (CHP) is tripling the number of officers assigned to address retail crime in Los Angeles.",
    "California Senate Republicans criticize the governor's plan for not providing sufficient resources despite increasing law enforcement presence.",
    "A recent flash mob robbery at a mall in Canoga Park resulted in $300,000 worth of merchandise being stolen by 30 suspects.",
    "At least 30 suspects stole $300,000 of merchandise from the Yves Saint Laurent store in Glendale.",
    "Senator Roger Niello introduced Senate Bill 316 to increase penalties for petty theft for repeat offenders.",
    "Senate Bill 316 was killed by the majority party members of the California Senate Public Safety Committee.",
    "Senator Niello believes that until laws are strengthened, Californians will continue to witness store lootings."
  ]
}
```
